source.title: Archives of Nethys: Arcanist spell list

spells.name: Aboleth's Lung
spells.summary: Allow the target to breathe water at the cost of no longer being able to breathe air.

spells.name: Accelerate Poison
spells.summary: Hastens targeted poison's onset.

spells.name: Acid Arrow
spells.summary: Ranged touch attack; 2d4 damage for 1 round + 1 round/three levels.

spells.name: Adhesive Blood
spells.summary: Attackers’ weapons stick to your gluey blood.

spells.name: Admonishing Ray
spells.summary: Fire multiple rays that deal nonlethal force.

spells.name: Adoration
spells.summary: You gain a bonus on Diplomacy checks and performance combat checks.

spells.name: Aggressive Thundercloud
spells.summary: Flying storm cloud deals 3d6 electricity damage.

spells.name: Air Step
spells.summary: Tread unsteadily on air, with limitations.

spells.name: Ally Across Time
spells.summary: Summon a duplicate of yourself from a parallel world to aid another

spells.name: Alter Self
spells.summary: Assume form of a Small or Medium humanoid.

spells.name: Alter Summoned Monster
spells.summary: Swap one summoned creature with another.

spells.name: Amplify Stench
spells.summary: Amplify your natural stench ability.

spells.name: Angelic Aspect, Lesser
spells.summary: Gain some minor aspects of angelic creatures.

spells.name: Animal Aspect
spells.summary: You gain some of the beneficial qualities of an animal.

spells.name: Ant Haul, Communal
spells.summary: As ant haul, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

spells.name: Anticipate Thoughts
spells.summary: Gain increasing bonuses to AC and on attack rolls and damage rolls against one creature.

spells.name: Anti-Summoning Shield
spells.summary: Impede the use of summon spells.

spells.name: Apport Object
spells.summary: Send or receive a small object via teleportation.

spells.name: Aram Zey's Focus
spells.summary: Grant the trapfinding ability or a +5 Disable Device bonus.

spells.name: Arcane Disruption
spells.summary: Make it difficult for others to cast arcane spells.

spells.name: Arcane Lock
spells.summary: Magically locks a portal or chest.

spells.name: Arrow Eruption
spells.summary: Creates duplicates of killing arrow.

spells.name: Ashen Path
spells.summary: Allow one or more creatures to ignore airborne effects and see through magical smoke and fog

spells.name: Assumed Likeness
spells.summary: Cloak yourself in a phantasm that ellicits certain emotions from observing creatures

spells.name: Aura of Distraction
spells.summary: Aura of psychic noise makes concentration difficult

spells.name: Badger's Ferocity
spells.summary: Weapons are keen while you concentrate.

spells.name: Beacon of Guilt
spells.summary: Cursed object highlights creatures that attempt to take it.

spells.name: Bear's Endurance
spells.summary: Subject gains +4 to Con for 1 min./level.

spells.name: Bestow Insight
spells.summary: Grant the target a bonus on a skill check and consider them trained.

spells.name: Bestow Weapon Proficiency
spells.summary: Grants a creature proficiency in a single weapon for short period of time.

spells.name: Billowing Skirt
spells.summary: Enchanted skirt slows your fall and allows you to hover

spells.name: Blade Tutor's Spirit
spells.summary: Summon a spirit to help your more reckless attacks.

spells.name: Blindness/Deafness
spells.summary: Makes subject blinded or deafened.

spells.name: Blood Armor
spells.summary: Your blood hardens when you are wounded, increasing your AC.

spells.name: Blood Blaze
spells.summary: Ignite the blood of those who come near you.

spells.name: Blood in the Water
spells.summary: Enhance those with a blood frenzy.

spells.name: Blood Transcription
spells.summary: Learn a spell from the target's blood.

spells.name: Bloodbath
spells.summary: Cause yourself and enemies to bleed.

spells.name: Bloody Tears and Jagged Smile
spells.summary: Become more intimidating with black eyes that weep blood and turn your teeth into jagged fangs.

spells.name: Blur
spells.summary: Attacks miss subject 20% of the time.

spells.name: Body Double
spells.summary: Change one creature to look and act like another.

spells.name: Boiling Blood
spells.summary: Targets take fire damage; orcs get +2 Strength.

spells.name: Bone Fists
spells.summary: Gain armor spikes which provide +1 natural armor and a +2 damage with natural weapons.

spells.name: Boneshaker
spells.summary: Momentarily control a living or undead creature's skeleton.

spells.name: Book Ward
spells.summary: Protect a book from fire, acid, and water.

spells.name: Brittle Portal
spells.summary: Reduce the hardness of objects within the area.

spells.name: Brow Gasher
spells.summary: Slashing weapon deals bleed damage to an opponent's head.

spells.name: Bullet Shield
spells.summary: You gain a +4 deflection bonus to AC against firearm attacks.

spells.name: Bullet Ward
spells.summary: Adamantine bullets intercept firearm attacks.

spells.name: Bull's Strength
spells.summary: Subject gains +4 to Str for 1 min./level.

spells.name: Buoyancy
spells.summary: Targets easily float on water.

spells.name: Burning Arc (Keleshite)
spells.summary: Fire an arc of flame from your fingers which bounces from target to target.

spells.name: Burning Gaze
spells.summary: Inflict 1d6 fire damage to creature by looking at it.

spells.name: Burst of Radiance
spells.summary: Fill the area with a blinding light.

spells.name: Callback
spells.summary: Teleport a familiar or spirit animal to your side when it is injured

spells.name: Carrion Compass
spells.summary: Animate the target undead’s organs to lead you to its most recent controller or cause of undeath.

spells.name: Carry Companion
spells.summary: Shrink an animal or magical beast down to stone, ready to be enlarged again when summoned.

spells.name: Cat's Grace
spells.summary: Subject gains +4 to Dex for 1 min./level.

spells.name: Celestial Companion
spells.summary: Give your companion protections against evil creatures

spells.name: Certain Grip
spells.summary: You gain a +4 competence bonus on Acrobatics and Climb checks and to CMD.

spells.name: Cloud of Seasickness
spells.summary: Create a sickening cloud that mimics the effects of seasickness.

spells.name: Codespeak
spells.summary: Speak, read, and Write a new code language.

spells.name: Command Undead
spells.summary: Undead creature obeys your commands.

spells.name: Commune with Birds
spells.summary: Ask a question to all birds within a mile of your location.

spells.name: Companion Life Link
spells.summary: Sense whenever your companion is wounded and call out to it in a time of need.

spells.name: Compassionate Ally
spells.summary: Target is compelled to help injured ally.

spells.name: Compel Tongue
spells.summary: As share language, but target can only speak and write in the language imparted.

spells.name: Compulsive Liar
spells.summary: Prevent target from speaking the truth.

spells.name: Contact Entity I
spells.summary: Ask eldritch entities to find and converse with you

spells.name: Continual Flame
spells.summary: Makes a permanent, heatless light.

spells.name: Corpse Lanterns
spells.summary: Create a sickly version of dancing lights.

spells.name: Covetous Urge
spells.summary: Target is compelled to steal valuable objects

spells.name: Crafter's Nightmare
spells.summary: Create a poltergeist to disrupt crafting and spellcasting

spells.name: Create Pit
spells.summary: Creates an extradimensional pit.

spells.name: Create Treasure Map
spells.summary: Creates treasure map out of a creature's corpse.

spells.name: Crimson Confession
spells.summary: Touching the marked object or area turns one’s skin red.

spells.name: Curse Terrain, Lesser
spells.summary: Curse an area with three mild hazards

spells.name: Cushioning Bands
spells.summary: Force bands protect against crushing.

spells.name: Dark Whispers
spells.summary: Whisper through the shadows.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.summary: 20-ft. radius of supernatural shadow.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.summary: See 60 ft. in total darkness.

spells.name: Daze Monster
spells.summary: Living creature of 6 HD or less loses next action.

spells.name: Death from Below
spells.summary: Target gains dodge bonus to AC against larger creatures.

spells.name: Defending Bone
spells.summary: Animate a bone to float near you and block physical attacks.

spells.name: Defensive Shock
spells.summary: Electricity damages your attackers.

spells.name: Defoliate
spells.summary: Hurl a tiny ball of negative energy to destroy plant life.

spells.name: Delay Pain
spells.summary: Ignore pain for 1 hour/level.

spells.name: Demand Offering
spells.summary: Make a creature give you an object it’s holding.

spells.name: Destabilize Powder
spells.summary: Ammunition in the targeted firearm is prone to misfire.

spells.name: Detect Magic, Greater
spells.summary: As detect magic, but learn more information.

spells.name: Detect Thoughts
spells.summary: Allows “listening” to surface thoughts.

spells.name: Determine Depth
spells.summary: Determine the exact thickness of a wall, ceiling, or other barrier.

spells.name: Diminish Resistance
spells.summary: Weaken a creature's resistance to one type of energy

spells.name: Diminished Detection
spells.summary: Reduce the areas of divination spells for the purpose of targeting you

spells.name: Disfiguring Touch
spells.summary: Target becomes disfigured.

spells.name: Disguise Other
spells.summary: As disguise self, but affects you or another.

spells.name: Disrupt Link
spells.summary: Sever the target’s link with her bonded creature.

spells.name: Dragonvoice
spells.summary: Emulate the vocal inflections of dragons.

spells.name: Drain Construct
spells.summary: Incapacitate a construct by draining its animating force

spells.name: Dress Corpse
spells.summary: Doctor the evidence on a corpse.

spells.name: Dust of Twilight
spells.summary: Black particles extinguish light sources within area.

spells.name: Eagle's Splendor
spells.summary: Subject gains +4 to Cha for 1 min./level.

spells.name: Eldritch Conduit
spells.summary: Create a conduit with which you can cast area effect spells from.

spells.name: Elemental Speech
spells.summary: Enables you to speak to elementals and some creatures.

spells.name: Elemental Touch
spells.summary: Gain energy damage touch attack.

spells.name: Embrace Destiny
spells.summary: Roll a single d20 and use its result later on.

spells.name: Enchantment Sight
spells.summary: See enchantment spells active on creatures

spells.name: Endure Elements, Communal
spells.summary: As endure elements, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

spells.name: Eroding Ray
spells.summary: ranged touch attack deals 2d6 to construct or object, +1 ray/four levels (max 3)

spells.name: Escape Alarm
spells.summary: As alarm, but alerts you when a creatuer leaves the area

spells.name: Escaping Ward
spells.summary: Gain maneuverability by avoiding the attacks of larger creatures.

spells.name: Euphoric Cloud
spells.summary: Fog obscures vision and fascinates living creatures.

spells.name: Extreme Flexibility
spells.summary: Gain a bonus to AC, on Escape Artist checks, and when grappling.

spells.name: False Age
spells.summary: Change to become one age category younger or older

spells.name: False Life
spells.summary: Gain 1d10 temporary hp + 1/level (max +10).

spells.name: Familiar Figment
spells.summary: Create an illusory duplicate of your familiar to fool enemies.

spells.name: Fear the Sun
spells.summary: Impose light blindness on your enemies.

spells.name: Fiery Runes
spells.summary: Charge a weapon with magical fiery runes.

spells.name: Fiery Shuriken
spells.summary: Calls forth several fiery projectiles ready to be flung at opponents.

spells.name: Fire Breath
spells.summary: Exhale a cone of flame at will.

spells.name: Fire Sneeze
spells.summary: Sneeze flame to set your enemies on fire and knock them prone.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.summary: Rolling ball of fire deals 3d6 fire damage.

spells.name: Fleeting Defect
spells.summary: Cause a single object to become broken. Can also disrupt a construct’s animating force.

spells.name: Fleshcurdle
spells.summary: Warp a creature's flesh, penalizing it in attack, defense, or movement.

spells.name: Fleshy Facade
spells.summary: Alter your appearance to appear living.

spells.name: Flickering Lights
spells.summary: Create an area of inconsistent lighting.

spells.name: Flurry of Snowballs
spells.summary: Cone-shaped blast of snowballs deals 4d6 cold damage.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.summary: Fog obscures vision.

spells.name: Fool's Gold (AA)
spells.summary: Make someone who accepts one of your gold pieces more vulnerable to your magic.

spells.name: Force Sword
spells.summary: Create a magical longsword made entirely of force.

spells.name: Fox's Cunning
spells.summary: Subject gains +4 to Int for 1 min./level.

spells.name: Frigid Touch
spells.summary: Target takes cold damage and is staggered.

spells.name: Frost Fall
spells.summary: The area is covered in a chilling frost.

spells.name: Full Pouch
spells.summary: Divide a consumable alchemical item into two nearly identical copies.

spells.name: Fungal Blisters
spells.summary: Develop a small number of fungal growths which burst as you take damage, choking your enemies with harmful spores.

spells.name: Garden of Peril
spells.summary: Grow a group of poisonous mushrooms.

spells.name: Ghost Whip
spells.summary: Create a ghost touch whip that passes through objects.

spells.name: Ghostly Disguise
spells.summary: You look like a ghost of yourself.

spells.name: Ghoul Hunger
spells.summary: Awaken an unnatural hunger in the target, causing it to seek out humanoid flesh.

spells.name: Ghoul Touch
spells.summary: Paralyzes one subject, which exudes stench that makes those nearby sickened.

spells.name: Gird Ally
spells.summary: Grant your summoned creatures a deflection bonus to their AC.

spells.name: Glide
spells.summary: You take no falling damage and move 60 ft./round while falling.

spells.name: Glitterdust
spells.summary: Blinds creatures, outlines invisible creatures.

spells.name: Grasping Vine
spells.summary: Sprout a 20-ft long vine that can assist with numerous tasks.

spells.name: Greensight
spells.summary: Grant a target the ability to see through plant matter as if it were transparent

spells.name: Gust of Wind
spells.summary: Blows away or knocks down smaller creatures.

spells.name: Gusting Sphere
spells.summary: Release a swirling ball of wind to move around and knock your enemies about.

spells.name: Harmless Form
spells.summary: Transform the target into a "harmless" animal.

spells.name: Haunting Mists
spells.summary: Creatures are shaken and take Wis damage.

spells.name: Haunting Reminder
spells.summary: After Intimidating a creature, make it afraid of your retribution

spells.name: Heckle
spells.summary: Shift the target’s attitude one step more hostile towards you and everyone else nearby. This also penalizes his attacks, saves, and certain skill checks.

spells.name: Hidden Blades
spells.summary: Turn weapon or ammunition invisible

spells.name: Hidden Knowledge
spells.summary: Remove one piece of information from your memory and turn it into a magical tattoo

spells.name: Hidden Presence
spells.summary: Prevent creatures from noticing your presence.

spells.name: Hideous Laughter
spells.summary: Subject loses actions for 1 round/ level.

spells.name: Hoodwink
spells.summary: Distort all of the targets senses

spells.name: Human Potential
spells.summary: Grant target a +2 enhancement bonus to an ability score.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spells.summary: Fascinates (2d4 + level) HD of creatures.

spells.name: Ice Slick
spells.summary: Coat an area with thin ice, dealing cold damage and causing creatures to fall prone.

spells.name: Identifier's Eye
spells.summary: As per detect magic, except affecting a creature you touch

spells.name: Illusory Maze
spells.summary: Create an illusion of an ever-changing maze of glass.

spells.name: Imbue with Elemental Might
spells.summary: As imbue with spell ability, except you transfer your elemental assault ability to the target.

spells.name: Influence Wild Magic
spells.summary: Stabilize an area of primal magic

spells.name: Instant Weapon
spells.summary: Summon a melee weapon to wield.

spells.name: Intensify Psyche
spells.summary: Amplify the targets emotions

spells.name: Investigative Mind
spells.summary: Roll twice and take the higher roll when using certain mental skills.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.summary: Subject is invisible for 1 min./level or until it attacks.

spells.name: Invisibility Bubble
spells.summary: As invisibility, but altered to work better underwater

spells.name: Jitterbugs
spells.summary: Force a creature to become jittery, taking a penalty on Dexterity-related checks and being unable to delay, ready, or take a total defense action.

spells.name: Kinetic Reverberation
spells.summary: Channels the force of an enemy's attack back into its weapon.

spells.name: Knock
spells.summary: Opens locked or magically sealed door.

spells.name: Know Peerage
spells.summary: Target uses your Knowledge (nobility) ranks.

spells.name: Languid Venom
spells.summary: Delay a poison's onset and hide its presence.

spells.name: Lead Plating
spells.summary: Enclose the target in a thin sheath of lead.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.summary: Subject moves up and down at your direction.

spells.name: Life Pact
spells.summary: Affected creatures automatically donate hp to stabilize fallen ally.

spells.name: Light Prison
spells.summary: Surround a creature with a light prison, damaging and blinding it if it attempts to escape.

spells.name: Limp Lash
spells.summary: Paralyze an enemy from the neck down.

spells.name: Lipstitch
spells.summary: Sew the target's lips together.

spells.name: Locate Object
spells.summary: Senses direction toward object (specific or type).

spells.name: Locate Portal
spells.summary: Detect portals within range

spells.name: Mad Hallucination
spells.summary: Target takes penalties to mental actions.

spells.name: Mage's Crawl Space
spells.summary: Create a personal hideaway in a surface

spells.name: Magic Mouth
spells.summary: Objects speaks once when triggered.

spells.name: Magic Siege Engine
spells.summary: Siege gains +1 on targeting and damage rolls.

spells.name: Make Whole
spells.summary: Repairs an object.

spells.name: Mark of Blood
spells.summary: Imbue some of your life force into a creature, being able to permanently detect its location.

spells.name: Masterwork Transformation
spells.summary: Make a normal item into a masterwork one.

spells.name: Mathematical Curse
spells.summary: Use the Path of Numbers to place a mathematical curse on someone.

spells.name: Merge with Familiar
spells.summary: Merge the body of your familiar or spirit animal into your own

spells.name: Minor Image
spells.summary: As silent image, plus some sound.

spells.name: Mirror Hideaway
spells.summary: As many as eight creatures hide in an extradimensional space.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.summary: Creates decoy duplicates of you (1d4 + 1 per three levels, max 8).

spells.name: Misdirection
spells.summary: Misleads divinations for one creature or object.

spells.name: Miserable Pity
spells.summary: Opponents cannot attack a pathetic creature.

spells.name: Molten Orb
spells.summary: Molten metal splash weapon deals 2d6 fire damage plus ongoing damage.

spells.name: Mortal Terror
spells.summary: Frighten creature with an existential crisis

spells.name: Mount, Communal
spells.summary: As mount, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

spells.name: Mud Buddy
spells.summary: Create a small minion out of mud.

spells.name: Nondetection, Lesser
spells.summary: As nondetection, but only protects against spells that target an area

spells.name: Obscure Object
spells.summary: Masks object against scrying.

spells.name: Obscured Script
spells.summary: Make the text on a page more difficult to decipher

spells.name: Oppressive Boredom
spells.summary: Target loses its next action.

spells.name: Owl's Wisdom
spells.summary: Subject gains +4 to Wis for 1 min./level.

spells.name: Page-Bound Epiphany
spells.summary: Fill an empty book with knowledge on a topic from around the world.

spells.name: Painful Revelation
spells.summary: damage creature who recognize an illusion for what it is

spells.name: Paranoia
spells.summary: Target becomes hostile to all creatures.

spells.name: Passing Fancy
spells.summary: Control the topic of conversation

spells.name: Peerless Integrity
spells.summary: Conceal the alignment of creatures from divination magic.

spells.name: Pernicious Poison
spells.summary: Target takes a -4 penalty against poison.

spells.name: Phantom Trap
spells.summary: Makes item seem trapped.

spells.name: Pilfering Hand
spells.summary: You may seize an object or manipulate it from afar.

spells.name: Planetarium
spells.summary: Project a current image of the nighty sky in places you would normally be unable to view it.

spells.name: Pouncing Fury
spells.summary: Make a full attack with your claws after a charge

spells.name: Protection from Arrows
spells.summary: Subject gains DR 10/magic against ranged attacks.

spells.name: Protection from Chaos, Communal
spells.summary: As protection from chaos, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

spells.name: Protection from Evil, Communal
spells.summary: As protection from evil, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

spells.name: Protection from Good, Communal
spells.summary: As protection from good, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

spells.name: Protection from Law, Communal
spells.summary: As protection from law, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

spells.name: Protection from Technology
spells.summary: +2 to AC and saves, plus additional protection against technology.

spells.name: Protective Penumbra
spells.summary: Shadow protects the target from light.

spells.name: Psychic Reading
spells.summary: Read surface thoughts to learn information about a subject.

spells.name: Pyrotechnics
spells.summary: Turns fire into blinding light or choking smoke.

spells.name: Qualm
spells.summary: Target gains penalties on ability checks, skill checks, and concentration checks until it spends an entire round doing nothing.

spells.name: Quick Change
spells.summary: Use change shape as a swift action and surprise foes.

spells.name: Radiation Ward
spells.summary: Protect a creature against radiation

spells.name: Raiment of Command
spells.summary: Cloak yourself in an illusion of authority.

spells.name: Raven's Flight
spells.summary: Quickly turn into a tiny blurred shape with flight.

spells.name: Recoil Fire
spells.summary: Ammunition in the targeted firearm generates excessive recoil.

spells.name: Reinforce Armaments, Communal
spells.summary: As reinforce armaments, but you may divide the spell's duration among objects touched.

spells.name: Reloading Hands
spells.summary: Loads a single shot into your weapon every round.

spells.name: Remarkable Legerdemain
spells.summary: Conceal items with uncanny skill.

spells.name: Resist Energy
spells.summary: Ignores 10 (or more) points of damage/attack from specified energy type.

spells.name: Retrieve Item
spells.summary: Call a small item into your hand from anywhere.

spells.name: Returning Weapon
spells.summary: Grants a weapon the returning special weapon quality.

spells.name: Reveal True Shape
spells.summary: Reveal the true form of a magically disguised/transformed creature.

spells.name: Revealing Light
spells.summary: As light, but hampers Stealth checks

spells.name: Ricochet Shot
spells.summary: Imbues a projectile weapon to give its ammunition the ability to ricochet.

spells.name: River Whip
spells.summary: Create a whip of water that you wield as a weapon.

spells.name: Rock Whip
spells.summary: Create a whip that passes through unworked stone

spells.name: Rope Trick
spells.summary: As many as eight creatures hide in extradimensional space.

spells.name: Rovagug's Fury
spells.summary: Create a minor earthquake to trip creatures.

spells.name: Rune of Rule
spells.summary: Bestow upon a creature one of the seven runes of rule

spells.name: Scale Spikes
spells.summary: Enhance a target’s scales with jagged spikes.

spells.name: Scare
spells.summary: Panics creatures of less than 6 HD.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.summary: Ranged touch attack deals 4d6 fire damage, + 1 ray/four levels (max 3).

spells.name: Sculpt Simulacrum
spells.summary: Alter a simulacrum's appearance.

spells.name: Searching Shadows
spells.summary: Shadows search for a creature or object in range

spells.name: Secret Sign
spells.summary: Invisibly inscribe a small mark or message on a creature or obejct.

spells.name: Secret Speech
spells.summary: Send secret messages to others within normal speech.

spells.name: Seducer's Eyes
spells.summary: Gain a bonus on Charisma-based skills towards those who find you attractive.

spells.name: See Invisibility
spells.summary: Reveals invisible creatures or objects.

spells.name: Semblance of Flesh
spells.summary: Disguise a construct as a creature of flesh.

spells.name: Sense Vitals
spells.summary: Gain the ability to sneak attack.

spells.name: Sensory Overload
spells.summary: Make concentrating difficult for a creautre, forcing a save to perform standard or full-round actions

spells.name: Sentry Skull
spells.summary: Create a grisly sentinel from the severed head of a humanoid or monstrous humanoid.

spells.name: Shackle
spells.summary: Summon manacles onto a target creature

spells.name: Shadow Anchor
spells.summary: Tether a creature to its shadow, preventing it from moving too far.

spells.name: Shadow Claws
spells.summary: Claws of shadow deal slashing damage and Strength damage

spells.name: Share Language
spells.summary: Subject understands chosen language.

spells.name: Share Memory
spells.summary: Share one memory with the target.

spells.name: Shared Suffering
spells.summary: Deal damage to another creature by harming yourself.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.summary: Sonic vibration damages objects or crystalline creatures.

spells.name: Shifted Steps
spells.summary: Make a target sound as if elsewhere.

spells.name: Silent Table
spells.summary: Give yourself privacy by muffling sound leaving the area.

spells.name: Silk To Steel
spells.summary: Use a scarf as a shield or whip.

spells.name: Skinsend
spells.summary: Animate and possess your own skin as if it were a separate creature.

spells.name: Slick Walls
spells.summary: Increase the DC of Climb checks in the area

spells.name: Slipstream
spells.summary: Wave boosts creature's speed.

spells.name: Snow Shape (Ulfen)
spells.summary: Form snow into any shape you wish, including hard ice weapons.

spells.name: Solidify Earth
spells.summary: Harden earth and stone, impeding burrowing creatures

spells.name: Sonic Scream
spells.summary: Create a cone of damaging sound at will.

spells.name: Spectral Hand
spells.summary: Creates disembodied glowing hand to deliver touch attacks.

spells.name: Spell Gauge
spells.summary: Discover some spells the target has prepared.

spells.name: Spider Climb
spells.summary: Grants ability to walk on walls and ceilings.

spells.name: Splinter Spell Resistance
spells.summary: Create an aura around a target weapon to weaken a foe’s magical defenses.

spells.name: Spontaneous Immolation
